```json { "new_chapter": { "id": "chapter-1", "title": "Into the Unknown", "content": "

Scene 1 · Chapter 1

As I stepped into the dense forest, the trees seemed to whisper secrets to each other, their leaves rustling in an unsettling melody. The air was heavy with an otherworldly scent, like ozone and honey combined. I felt a shiver run down my spine as I ventured deeper, the silence between the whispers growing thicker, like a tangible mist.
